_comment: Canned LLM completion for the MOCK=1 LLM-response-cache demo in 30-03. No API key needed; this is what the live call (MOCK=0) would populate the cache with. Token counts are illustrative.
prompt: Summarize this support ticket in one sentence: 'My order ORD-9912 never arrived and the tracking page is blank.'
completion: The customer reports that order ORD-9912 was never delivered and its tracking page shows no information.
